name: Fried Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. 3-4 Spanish onions, cut into slices that are 1/4 inch thick.
2. Separate the slices into rings.
3. Soak the onion rings in ice water for at least two hours.
4. Drain the onion rings and dry them thoroughly.
5. Sift flour with salt and baking soda.
6. Beat Egg; add buttermilk, then add the dry ingredients and beat until blended.
7. Dip the onion rings into the batter.
8. Fry the onion rings in deep hot peanut oil until they are golden brown.
9. Drain the fried onion rings on paper towels.
